### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>sigstore/sigstore (github.com/sigstore/sigstore)</summary>

### [`v1.10.7`](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/sigstore/releases/tag/v1.10.7)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/sigstore/compare/v1.10.6...v1.10.7)

#### What's Changed

- add functional options to DSSE to improve memory usage, validation in [#​2326](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/sigstore/pull/2326)
- Extend PEM private key unmarshalling to support legacy format in [#​2332](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/sigstore/pull/2332)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/sigstore/sigstore/compare/v1.10.6...v1.10.7>
